meaning: n.逍遥,散步,逍遥学派的哲学
examples: The emphasis is the relation between the Equality of things and Peripateticism.
It also deserves our attention that the thought was annotated in Zhuang Zi's Peripateticism.
In fact, "Materialization" embodies more Chuang Tzu's ideology of "Peripateticism Experience".
